personalInfo.headline: Building the Future, One Line of Code at a Time
personalInfo.subtitle: Computer Science student passionate about creating impactful software solutions. Currently seeking a software development internship to contribute, learn, and grow with an innovative team.

experiences.title: Distributed Systems Internship
description: Modeled, implemented, and tested distributed systems with inter-software communication
Developed reliable communication protocols and validated system behavior in client-server and P2P architectures
Gained practical experience in distributed system design and protocol reliability

experiences.title: Telecommunications Internship
description: Managed and monitored subscriber lines and network traffic using professional telecom software
Learned mobile network mechanisms, including location updates and handovers
Gained hands-on experience with distribution frames and network monitoring systems

internshipGoals.interests: Full-stack projects, modern development practices, team environment
internshipGoals.whatIOffer: Strong problem-solving skills, quick learning ability, dedication to writing clean code, and enthusiasm for collaborative development
